name: ETH Asymmetric Trend Persistence v1
thesis: ETH 4h is the best-fit similar-asset lane for testing trend continuation with asymmetric exit logic where trigger, risk, and exit indicators play different roles. Even in chop, occasional persistence bursts can exist if management exits quickly when momentum decays.
edge_mechanism: trend persistence with asymmetric exit logic
invalidation_condition: Abort if structure-hold entries are too sparse, if exit asymmetry adds complexity without real benefit, or if persistence decays too fast after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: A short-lived persistence burst appears after structure is reclaimed and held, but requires different tools for trigger, stop logic, and exit decay.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Even in choppy markets, brief trend bursts occur. Separating the trigger from the exit decay detector can capture those bursts without forcing a single indicator to do every job.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is cleaner than TAO for this test because brief continuation behavior is more orderly and less erratic, making asymmetric management more interpretable.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If the market stays purely rotational, continuation entries will degrade into whipsaw before exits can help.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries are valid but persistence is too short, reduce runner exposure before tightening the trigger.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; RSI is reserved for exits rather than entry confirmation
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: controlled by broad structure-hold definitions instead of rare breakout spikes

long: Trail 45% size by 0.7 * ATR_14 while RSI_14 >= 52
Exit remaining 20% when RSI_14 falls below 50 or after 9 bars
Emergency time-based de-risk after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.2 * ATR_14
short: Trail 45% size by 0.7 * ATR_14 while RSI_14 <= 48
Exit remaining 20% when RSI_14 rises above 50 or after 9 bars
Emergency time-based de-risk after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.2 * ATR_14
